description: CompositionBlack dress made 100% rayon, has a V-neck, short sleeves, pleats down the bust line, and has a mid-riff braided mock beltFittingSlimWash carePreferably dry clean, or hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentFlat dryIron on reverse Look playfully chic at parties in this striking black dress from AND. In a stark single toned black and adorned with a luxe braided band on the mid-riff, this piece of clothing created by Anita Dongre is a modern take on contemporary fashion. Team it with vintage-inspired chunky jewellery and pumps.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in dressesHeight: 5'7", Chest: 33", Waist: 26"
